contentBlocks.translation: She who has established, by divine sport (līlā), all the worlds that had been dissolved, and who is sought inwardly for a long time by yogīs who have transcended the world — blazing with the radiance of a line of young suns — may that Golden One (Gaurī) protect us.
contentBlocks.meanings: līlā-labdha-sthāpita-lupta-akhila-loka: who has established by sport all dissolved worlds | loka-atīta: transcending the world | yogibhir-antaḥ-cira-mṛgyā: sought inwardly for a long time by yogīs | bāla-āditya-śreṇī: line of young suns | samāna-dyuti-puñja: equal blazing radiance | gaurī: the Golden/Bright One

contentBlocks.original:
प्रत्याहारध्यानसमाधिस्थितिभाजां
नित्यं चित्ते निर्वृतिकाष्ठां कलयन्तीम् ।
सत्यज्ञानानन्दमयीं तां तनुरूपां
गौरीमम्बामम्बुरुहाक्षीमहमीडे ॥ २ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
pratyāhāradhyānasamādhisthitibhājāṃ
nityaṃ chittē nirvṛtikāṣṭhāṃ kalayantīm ।
satyajñānānandamayīṃ tāṃ tanurūpāṃ
gaurīmambāmamburuhākṣīmahamīḍē ॥ 2 ॥
contentBlocks.translation: She who eternally brings the highest spiritual attainment (nirvṛti-kāṣṭhā) into the minds of those absorbed in pratyāhāra, dhyāna, and samādhi — who is of the nature of truth, consciousness, and bliss — embodying the sound-Brahman (śabda-brahman) — may she protect us on the shore [of liberation].
contentBlocks.meanings: pratyāhāra: withdrawal of senses (fifth limb of yoga) | dhyāna: meditation | samādhi: absorption | nitya: eternally | citta: mind | nirvṛti-kāṣṭhā: the highest spiritual attainment/bliss | kalayantī: bringing/holding | satya-jñāna-ānanda-mayī: of the nature of truth-consciousness-bliss | śabda-brahma-ānanda-mayī: embodying the sound-Brahman | taṭa-stha: on the shore

contentBlocks.translation: She whose face glows with a gentle smile delighted by Candrapīḍa (Śiva) — whose mass of dark locks is adorned by Candrapīḍa's moon — whose feet are worshipped by Indra, Upendra (Viṣṇu), and others — may that Gaurī, born on the mountain, protect us.
contentBlocks.meanings: candra-apīḍa-ānandita: delighted by the moon-crested one (Śiva) | manda-smita-vaktra: face with gentle smile | candra-apīḍa-alaṅkṛta: adorned by Candrapīḍa's (Śiva's) moon | nīla-alaka-bhāra: mass of dark locks | indra-upendra-ādi-arcita-pāda: feet worshipped by Indra, Upendra (Viṣṇu), and others | giri-sambhavā: born on the mountain

contentBlocks.original:
आदिक्षान्तामक्षरमूर्त्या विलसन्तीं
भूते भूते भूतकदम्बप्रसवित्रीम् ।
शब्दब्रह्मानन्दमयीं तां तटिदाभां
गौरीमम्बामम्बुरुहाक्षीमहमीडे ॥ ४ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
ādikṣāntāmakṣaramūrtyā vilasantīṃ
bhūtē bhūtē bhūtakadambaprasavitrīm ।
śabdabrahmānandamayīṃ tāṃ taṭidābhāṃ
gaurīmambāmamburuhākṣīmahamīḍē ॥ 4 ॥
contentBlocks.translation: She who shines in the form of all letters (akṣara-mūrti) from 'a' to 'kṣa' — who generates multitudes of beings within each being — who is of the nature of the bliss of śabda-Brahman — that Gaurī who stands on the riverbank — may she protect us.
contentBlocks.meanings: ādi-kṣānta: from 'a' to 'kṣa' (all letters of the Sanskrit alphabet) | akṣara-mūrtyā: in the form of all imperishable letters | vilasantī: shining | bhūte bhūte: within each being | bhūta-kadamba: multitude of beings | prasavitṛ: generator | śabda-brahma-ānanda-mayī: of the nature of bliss of the sound-Brahman | taṭa-sthā: standing on the riverbank

contentBlocks.original:
मूलाधारादुत्थितवीथ्या विधिरन्ध्रं
सौरं चान्द्रं व्याप्य विहारज्वलिताङ्गीम् ।
येयं सूक्ष्मात्सूक्ष्मतनुस्तां सुखरूपां
गौरीमम्बामम्बुरुहाक्षीमहमीडे ॥ ५ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
mūlādhārādutthitavīthyā vidhirandhraṃ
sauraṃ chāndraṃ vyāpya vihārajvalitāṅgīm ।
yēyaṃ sūkṣmātsūkṣmatanustāṃ sukharūpāṃ
gaurīmambāmamburuhākṣīmahamīḍē ॥ 5 ॥
contentBlocks.translation: She who, rising from the mūlādhāra through the path of the suṣumnā, pervades the solar and lunar channels and blazes throughout her body in divine sport — she who is subtler than the subtle — may that Gaurī, the Kuṇḍalinī-Śakti, protect us.
contentBlocks.meanings: mūlādhāra: the root-support cakra (base of spine) | utthita-vīthyā: rising through the path | vidhi-randhra: the path of suṣumnā (central channel) | sauran-cāndran: solar and lunar channels (piṅgalā and iḍā) | vyāpya: pervading | vihāra-jvalita-aṅgī: blazing throughout her body in sport | sūkṣmāt-sūkṣmatarā: subtler than the subtle | kuṇḍalinī-śakti

contentBlocks.original:
नित्यः शुद्धो निष्कल एको जगदीशः
साक्षी यस्याः सर्गविधौ संहरणे च ।
विश्वत्राणक्रीडनलोलां शिवपत्नीं
गौरीमम्बामम्बुरुहाक्षीमहमीडे ॥ ६ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
nityaḥ śuddhō niṣkala ēkō jagadīśaḥ
sākṣī yasyāḥ sargavidhau saṃharaṇē cha ।
viśvatrāṇakrīḍanalōlāṃ śivapatnīṃ
gaurīmambāmamburuhākṣīmahamīḍē ॥ 6 ॥
contentBlocks.translation: She whose witness — in her acts of creation and dissolution — is the eternal, pure, partless, singular lord of the world; who is playfully intent on the sport of protecting the universe — may that consort of Śiva (Śiva-patnī) protect us.
contentBlocks.meanings: nitya: eternal | śuddha: pure | niṣkala: without parts | eka: singular | jagad-īśa: lord of the world | sākṣī: witness | sarga-vidhau: in the act of creation | saṃharaṇe ca: and in dissolution | viśva-trāṇa-krīḍana-lola: playfully intent on the sport of protecting the universe | śiva-patnī: consort of Śiva

contentBlocks.original:
यस्याः कुक्षौ लीनमखण्डं जगदण्डं
भूयो भूयः प्रादुरभूदुत्थितमेव ।
पत्या सार्धं तां रजताद्रौ विहरन्तीं
गौरीमम्बामम्बुरुहाक्षीमहमीडे ॥ ७ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
yasyāḥ kukṣau līnamakhaṇḍaṃ jagadaṇḍaṃ
bhūyō bhūyaḥ prādurabhūdutthitamēva ।
patyā sārdhaṃ tāṃ rajatādrau viharantīṃ
gaurīmambāmamburuhākṣīmahamīḍē ॥ 7 ॥
contentBlocks.translation: In whose womb the entire undivided cosmic egg dissolved and has again and again appeared and been manifest — may we see that one who sports with her husband on the silver mountain (Kailāsa).
contentBlocks.meanings: yasya kukṣau: in whose womb | līna: dissolved | akhaṇḍa: undivided | jagat-aṇḍa: cosmic egg | bhūyo bhūyaḥ: again and again | prādur-abhūt: has appeared | utthita: manifested | patyā sārdhaṃ: together with her husband | rajata-adri: silver mountain (Kailāsa) | viharantī: sporting

contentBlocks.original:
यस्यामोतं प्रोतमशेषं मणिमाला-
-सूत्रे यद्वत्कापि चरं चाप्यचरं च ।
तामध्यात्मज्ञानपदव्या गमनीयां
गौरीमम्बामम्बुरुहाक्षीमहमीडे ॥ ८ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
yasyāmōtaṃ prōtamaśēṣaṃ maṇimālā-
-sūtrē yadvatkāpi charaṃ chāpyacharaṃ cha ।
tāmadhyātmajñānapadavyā gamanīyāṃ
gaurīmambāmamburuhākṣīmahamīḍē ॥ 8 ॥
contentBlocks.translation: In whom everything — moving and unmoving — is woven and threaded like a garland of gems on a string — may that Gaurī, reachable through the path of self-knowledge (adhyātma-jñāna), protect us.
contentBlocks.meanings: yasyām: in whom | otaṃ protam: woven and threaded (horizontal and vertical weave) | aśeṣam: completely/without remainder | maṇi-mālā-sūtre: like a garland of gems on a string | caram ca acaram ca: moving and unmoving | adhyātma-jñāna-padavyā: through the path of self-knowledge | gamanīyā: reachable/approachable

contentBlocks.original:
नानाकारैः शक्तिकदम्बैर्भुवनानि
व्याप्य स्वैरं क्रीडति येयं स्वयमेका ।
कल्याणीं तां कल्पलतामानतिभाजां
गौरीमम्बामम्बुरुहाक्षीमहमीडे ॥ ९ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
nānākāraiḥ śaktikadambairbhuvanāni
vyāpya svairaṃ krīḍati yēyaṃ svayamēkā ।
kalyāṇīṃ tāṃ kalpalatāmānatibhājāṃ
gaurīmambāmamburuhākṣīmahamīḍē ॥ 9 ॥
contentBlocks.translation: She who, remaining one (eka) by herself, plays freely through multitudes of powers in various forms, pervading the worlds — may that auspicious Gaurī, the wish-fulfilling tree (kalpa-latā), cause those who bow to her to cross over [saṃsāra].
contentBlocks.meanings: nānā-ākāraiḥ śakti-kadambaiḥ: through multitudes of powers in various forms | bhuvanāni: worlds | vyāpya: pervading | svairam: freely | krīḍati: plays | yeyam svayam ekā: she who remains one by herself | kalyāṇī: auspicious | kalpa-latā: wish-fulfilling creeper | ānatān uttārayat: causes those who bow to cross over

contentBlocks.original:
आशापाशक्लेशविनाशं विदधानां
पादाम्भोजध्यानपराणां पुरुषाणाम् ।
ईशामीशार्धाङ्गहरां तामभिरामां
गौरीमम्बामम्बुरुहाक्षीमहमीडे ॥ १० ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
āśāpāśaklēśavināśaṃ vidadhānāṃ
pādāmbhōjadhyānaparāṇāṃ puruṣāṇām ।
īśāmīśārdhāṅgaharāṃ tāmabhirāmāṃ
gaurīmambāmamburuhākṣīmahamīḍē ॥ 10 ॥
contentBlocks.translation: She who, for men devoted to meditation on her lotus-feet, brings about the destruction of the bonds of hope and the afflictions [of saṃsāra] — the sovereign Goddess (Īśā), who occupies half of the lord's body (Ardhanārīśvara) — may that beautiful Gaurī protect us always.
contentBlocks.meanings: āśā-pāśa-kleśa-vināśa: destruction of the bonds of hope and afflictions | pāda-ambhoja-dhyāna-parāṇāṃ: for those devoted to meditation on the lotus-feet | puruṣāṇāṃ: for men/persons | īśā: sovereign Goddess | īśa-ardha-aṅga-harā: who occupies half of the lord's body (Ardhanārīśvara) | abhirāmā: beautiful

contentBlocks.original:
प्रातःकाले भावविशुद्धः प्रणिधाना-
-द्भक्त्या नित्यं जल्पति गौरीदशकं यः ।
वाचां सिद्धिं सम्पदमग्र्यां शिवभक्तिं
तस्यावश्यं पर्वतपुत्री विदधाति ॥ ११ ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
prātaḥkālē bhāvaviśuddhaḥ praṇidhānā-
-dbhaktyā nityaṃ jalpati gaurīdaśakaṃ yaḥ ।
vāchāṃ siddhiṃ sampadamagryāṃ śivabhaktiṃ
tasyāvaśyaṃ parvataputrī vidadhāti ॥ 11 ॥
contentBlocks.translation: Whoever recites with devotion and with focused concentration, every morning, these Ten Verses on Gaurī — attains perfection of speech, prosperity without bound, auspicious qualities, and liberation in the end.
contentBlocks.meanings: prātaḥ-kāle: in the morning | bhāva-viśuddha: with pure feeling/devotion | praṇidhānāt: with focused concentration | bhaktyā: with devotion | nitya: always | jalpati: recites | gaurī-daśaka: Ten Verses on Gaurī | vācāṃ siddhi: perfection of speech | sampada: prosperity | agaṇita: without bound | maṅgala-guṇa: auspicious qualities | mukti: liberation

contentBlocks.original: इति श्रीमत्परमहंसपरिव्राजकाचार्यस्य श्रीगोविन्दभगवत्पूज्यपादशिष्यस्य श्रीमच्छङ्करभगवतः कृतौ गौरी दशकम् ।
contentBlocks.transliteration: iti śrīmatparamahaṃsaparivrājakāchāryasya śrīgōvindabhagavatpūjyapādaśiṣyasya śrīmachChaṅkarabhagavataḥ kṛtau gaurī daśakam ।
contentBlocks.translation: Thus [ends] the Gaurī Daśakam — composed by the revered Śrī Śaṅkara Bhagavān, disciple of the venerable Śrī Govinda Bhagavatpāda, a teacher of the order of supreme renunciates (paramahaṃsa parivrājakācārya).
contentBlocks.meanings: paramahaṃsa-parivrājakācārya: teacher of the order of supreme renunciates | śrī govinda bhagavat-pūjya-pāda: venerable Śrī Govinda Bhagavatpāda (Śaṅkara's guru) | śiṣya: disciple | śrī mat śaṅkara bhagavataḥ kṛtau: composed by the blessed Śrī Śaṅkara | gaurī daśakam: Ten Verses on Gaurī
